summary: Start M6-LAYERED-AI-001 after M6-CLIENT-ALPHA-SURFACES-001 closed on origin/main. The simulation_engineer must implement bounded deterministic layered AI for full Alpha runs across strategic, diplomatic, succession, policy, campaign, and recovery decisions, using only player-available GameCommand payloads and reason-coded traces.

tests_run.result: M6-LAYERED-AI-001 and M6-ACCESSIBILITY-CORE-FLOWS-001 are dependency-ready after M6 client alpha surfaces closure; layered AI selected by M6 priority.
Previous task is valid and CLOSED on main.

decisions: Start M6-LAYERED-AI-001 as the next high-priority M6 implementation task.
Layered AI must be bounded decision strata, not a future-proof general manager abstraction or hidden scoring singleton.
AI must submit the same GameCommand payloads available to player paths and must expose bounded reason traces for action and no-action decisions.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and must not be introduced as an assumption or UI/system dependency.
risks: R4 simulation/AI work touches authority and determinism boundaries; systems_architect review is required before lead acceptance.
The implementation must avoid Math.random, Date.now, object-order dependence, privileged AI mutation, runtime script engines, telemetry, server services, and hidden rescue hooks.
requested_action: Simulation writer must implement layered AI within allowed paths, run required tests, and emit REVIEW handoff routed to systems_architect.
